title: Courteous
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
'''''Courteous''''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] cruiser of unknown class dispatched from the [[Centrality/Legends|Centrality]] to blockade the [[ThonBoka|Starcave]]. It was destroyed just before the [[Battle of ThonBoka]] when a negotiating party of [[Oswaft]] [[Maser voice-stream|shouted]] at it.

==Appearances==
*''[[Lando Calrissian and the Starcave of ThonBoka]]''

==Sources==
*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
